title: x-editor
description: UI editor metadata for filter and step parameter properties. Describes how a parameter should be rendered, validated, and laid out in a configuration UI. Used as the value of the x-editor extension property on JSON Schema property definitions.

widget.description: Widget type that determines the UI control for this parameter.

x-enumDescriptions.dropdown: Dropdown menu for selecting from a list of values
x-enumDescriptions.select: Scrollable list for selecting from a list of values
x-enumDescriptions.path: File path input with browse button
x-enumDescriptions.folder: Folder path input with browse button
x-enumDescriptions.codeFinder: Inline code finder rule editor (regex patterns with sample text)
x-enumDescriptions.checkList: List of checkboxes with per-entry labels

enabledBy.description: Master/slave dependency — this parameter is only enabled when the master parameter has a specific state.

parameter.description: Name of the master parameter that controls this one

enabledWhenSelected.description: If true, this parameter is enabled when the master is selected/true. If false, enabled when master is deselected/false.

layout.description: Layout hints for the parameter's UI rendering.

withLabel.description: Whether to display a label for this parameter. False for parameters whose label is implicit (e.g. a path field under a master checkbox).

vertical.description: If true, render label above the input (vertical layout). If false, render label beside the input (horizontal).

text.description: Properties specific to text input widgets.

password.description: If true, mask the input as a password field.

allowEmpty.description: If true, the text field accepts empty/blank values.

height.description: Height in rows for multiline text area. Omit or 1 for single-line input.

path.description: Properties specific to file path input widgets.

browseTitle.description: Title for the file browse dialog.

forSaveAs.description: If true, show a Save-As dialog. If false, show an Open dialog.

allowEmpty.description: If true, the path field accepts empty values.

filters.description: File type filters for the browse dialog.

name.description: Display name for the filter (e.g. 'SRX Documents')

folder.description: Properties specific to folder path input widgets.

browseTitle.description: Title for the folder browse dialog.

checkList.description: Properties specific to check list widgets.

description.description: Tooltip or help text for this entry
